title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is expanding AI-assisted development capabilities through daily deployments and accelerated legacy system upgrades. The company claims high-adoption teams completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster and projects 40% more capabilities by 2026.
